description:
Just a few minutes away from beach/Atlantic Ocean. In a peaceful and quiet community with pool. WiFi, Netflix, local cable TV, and two parking spaces are included.
Attention: Rental between 6/4 through 8/20 is on the Sat-to-Sat base.

The space
This new luxury single-family attached home has 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths. It is located just a few minutes from the Atlantic Ocean/beach and a few steps away from the outdoor community pool (open after March 31st).

Step inside and you are greeted by warm wood floors, cheerful and comfortable seating in the living area with a queen sleeper sofa, a dining table that seats five plus, a large flat screen HD SmartTV with local programs and Netflix streaming. A kitchen, a half bath, laundry with washer and dryer, and access to a fenced backyard patio is also located on the first level.

The fully equipped kitchen has everything you need to prepare and serve meals for family and friends with seating for two at the breakfast counter. The enclosed backyard features a charcoal grill and a patio set that seats four plus.

The first level also features the master bedroom with a comfortable queen bed, dressing table, flat screen HD TV, and private bathroom with a walk-in shower.

The second level features two bed rooms and a full bath with tub/shower combo. One with a comfortable queen bed, loveseat sofa, and flat screen HD TV; another with one Queen-bed, one twin-bed, one pullout trundle bed, flat screen HD TV, and a Blu-ray/DVD player with Netflix streaming.

Parking, high speed internet access, cable TV, and Netflix streaming are included.

Location: The community is located South end of Myrtle Beach - just minutes away from all the attractions, shopping, dining, and entertainment Myrtle Beach has to offer. Close and convenient to Family Kingdom, Broadway at Beach, Market Common area, Malls and Outlets, Brookgreen Garden, Convention Center, and International Airport.

description:

Hallway has built in bunkbeds with privacy curtain and separate dresser. Kitchen has dishwasher, glasstop stove with oven, full size microwave and refrigerator, Table with seating for six. listing_name: Wonderful Beachfront View - Myrtle Beach C208 Ocea
description:
Your Perfect Getaway with nearby major attractions

Located directly on the beachfront, there is no better place to stay in Myrtle Beach! The condo is completely equipped with beach toys, wireless internet and more so you can enjoy your stay without worry! And the best part is the community owns the private beach in front of the complex so come on and enjoy the fun! All HOA Rules apply (no RVs, no boats and no commercial vehicles permitted. Washer and Dryers on second floor of building.

The space
We provide a clean, newly appointed and safe location for your family or guests to create those special memories. Our arrival and check-in is completely contact-free. There are no elevators in this three-story complex so there are approximately 20 steps up to floor 2. We provide two parking passes, starter laundry detergent, starter dishwashing detergent and hand sanitizer. No Motorcycles, watercraft or trailers per HOA rules.

Entry: Keypad on the interior door (you must first open the storm door and then enter your unique code on the keypad.)

Convenience Features: Ring Doorbell on the exterior of the condo; Condo is equipped with a NEST learning thermostat which you may adjust. Please note that if the slider doors or front door is open for an extended period of time then the thermostat will turn OFF to reduce stress on the HVAC equipment. It will cycle back on once all doors are closed. All bathrooms and sinks are equipped with Govee water leak detectors for our piece of mind. These are located on the floors behind the two toilets and underneath each sink. Should the alarm on the unit sound, just press the button if we haven't called you first!

WIFI - High-speed wifi internet access throughout the condo provided by Spectrum and it's fast enough for you to stream video on multiple devices.

TVs: 3 flat screen VIZIO TVs in the condo with VIZIO streaming apps. Living room and master bedroom are connected to cable boxes. The guest bedroom also has a Nintendo Wii Gaming system.

Ceiling Fans in each bedroom as well as the living room.

Kitchen: fully stocked with anything you could potentially need for your vacation. We have a blender, toaster oven, coffee maker, cookie sheets, pizza wheel and the list goes on......

Master Bedroom ensuite: features a queen bed, ceiling fan, large flat screen TV and balcony access through the slider door. The bathroom has been redone with a ceramic-tiled walk-in shower. There is a large closet in the hallway after you enter the master bedroom. That closet will have enough room for your luggage. You will find a laundry basket, some hangers and an ironing board in that closet. There is a secondary closet (locked) in the master bedroom that is an owner's closet and another locked owner's closet between both bedrooms. These are for our staff or owner use only and you won't have access to those closets.

Guest Bedroom: features two new twin beds that may be converted into a swing-king configuration upon request in advance of arrival. Ceiling fan and a large storage closet are also in this bedroom.

Queen-sized sleeper sofa in the living room with a foam cushion located in the guest bedroom closet.

Bathrooms: Both bathrooms have been recently updated with tile showers, new toilets, new cabinets, new sinks and ceramic tile flooring. Under the sink in each bathroom you will find extra starter toilet paper and a hairdryer.

Balcony: Direct oceanfront view to the Atlantic ocean just a couple hundred yards away and quick access to the beach Balcony may be accessed from either the living room or the master bedroom. We have a table and seating for 4 for cocktails, hors d'oeuvre, breakfast or whatever you fancy!

Pool / Hot Tubs: There are two pools and two hot tubs in the complex. The pools are located between A/B and C/D buildings and are open mid-March to Mid-November. There is a kiddie pool located between C/D buildings. The hot tubs are open all year long.

Beach Access: This is a private beach owned by the HOA and signs are marked as such. You will have full access to the beach and there are five access points across the street. During the summer months there are beach chair and umbrellas available on the beach, if you need additional items. There are also foot showers between each building for you to rinse of these items as well as your feet.

Beach Toys: We have beach chairs, umbrellas, boogie board and other odds and ends in the front closet. That closet door will actually open out toward you--- we've designed this to make it easy to take things out of the closet and return them to their space.

Cleaning and Linens: we launder linens, comforters and towels between each guest as we take hygiene and cleanliness with utmost care. There are extra linens (sheets) and bath towels up to six guests in the guest bedroom closet. We do not provide beach towels.

Laundry: While our space does not accommodate a washer or dryer, there are 3 coin-operated washers and dryers on the second floor, mid-point of each building. We recommend bringing quarters if you are planning on doing laundry.

Additional Amenities: There is an outdoor grilling area for guest and workout stations along N. Ocean Boulevard. The Myrtle Beach tennis center is within 1.5 miles and there are 8 brand new pickleball courts at Midway Park which is off Business route 17 by the Myrtle Beach International Airport.

Guest access
Electronic keypad entry, contact-free access. There is a Ring Video Doorbell at the front door of the condo.

listing_name: Golf Views Near Broadway @ Beach
description:
Welcome to this spacious ground-floor condo in the desirable Magnolia Pointe community. Enjoy resort-style living with access to multiple outdoor pools, scenic walking paths, and a golf course setting. The condo features comfortable bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a full kitchen, washer and dryer, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Perfectly located near the beach, Broadway at the Beach, shopping, dining, and top attractions—ideal for families, couples, and golf getaways.

The space
🏡 Ground-Floor Poolside Condo | Near Top Attractions

Welcome to this spacious ground-floor 2BR/2BA condo with direct pool access, no carpet, and a peaceful lake view—perfect for families, friends, or a relaxing Myrtle Beach getaway.

🛏️ Sleeping Arrangements
• Master Bedroom: 1 King bed + 1 Double bed, en-suite bathroom, walk-in closet, HDTV
• Second Bedroom: 2 Double beds, private full bathroom with washer & dryer

⭐ What Guests Love
• Walk straight out to the pool from the patio
• BBQ grill just steps away in the backyard
• Quiet, resort-style setting with 24-hour security
• Sprinkler system in every room for added safety

🏖️ Location Highlights
Centrally located near the beach and minutes from Broadway at the Beach, shopping, dining, and family attractions—without sharing the exact address.

🧺 Amenities Included
✔️ Free high-speed Wi-Fi
✔️ Washer & dryer (in-unit)
✔️ Fully equipped kitchen
✔️ HDTV in living room & master bedroom
✔️ Free parking for 1–2 cars in front of the building
✔️ Access to 7 outdoor pools
✔️ BBQ stations throughout the community

Guest access
Guests will have full and private access to the entire ground-floor condo during their stay. This includes all living spaces, bedrooms, bathrooms, the fully equipped kitchen, and the private patio with direct access to the pool and nearby BBQ grill.

You’ll also enjoy access to all community amenities, including multiple outdoor pools and shared BBQ stations. Free parking is available for one or two vehicles directly in front of the building for added convenience.

The condo is located in a secure, resort-style community with 24-hour security, allowing guests to relax and enjoy a safe, comfortable stay.

Other things to note
To ensure a comfortable stay for everyone, please review and follow these house rules:
• No pets allowed
• No parties or events
• Maximum occupancy must be adhered to at all times
• Quiet hours are enforced from 10:00 PM to 8:00 AM
• No smoking or vaping inside the condo or on the balcony
• No trailers, watercraft, motorcycles, buses, or motor homes are permitted anywhere on Magnolia Pointe properties

Violation of these rules may result in additional fees or removal from the property without a refund, in accordance with Airbnb policies.

🚨 House Rules & Community Enforcement

This property is located in a community with strict HOA and city enforcement policies.

The City of North Myrtle Beach actively enforces a Nuisance Party Ordinance, and violations may result in police involvement, fines, or removal from the property.

By booking, you agree to the following:

No parties, events, or gatherings are allowed
Strict quiet hours must be observed (no excessive noise at any time)
No overcrowding beyond the approved number of guests
No illegal activity, including underage drinking or substance use
Parking must follow community rules and must not block access or traffic

🚫 Zero Tolerance Policy:
Any violation of these rules may result in:

Immediate cancellation of your stay
Removal from the property without refund
Additional fines or fees as imposed by the HOA or city

We take these policies seriously to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for all guests and neighbors.

Thank you for your cooperation!

Security & Guest Verification
This property complies with local regulations, which include completing a rental agreement, ID verification, and a refundable security hold (pending only, not a charge). Guests may opt for a $49 non-refundable damage waiver, with an additional $3 per day for stays longer than 10 nights.

Guest Portal
We use Happy Guest, a secure, user-friendly guest portal where you can access your rental agreement, check-in details, and a comprehensive local guide with dining options, activities, and recommendations. No app download is required.

◆ Please be aware that during the following dates, access to the community will be modified due to local events:

May 14th – May 17th
May 22nd – May 25th

listing_name: Contemporary 2-BR cottage, 2 Blocks to Beach
description:
Welcome to Gulfstream Cottages 336! This 2 bedroom, 2 bath cottage has distance from the beach with an outdoor community pool. It's located in a very quiet and safe neighborhood, only one block to the beach.
Gulfstream Cottage is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South; just minutes to all Myrtle Beach attractions, shopping and dining.

The space
Welcome to Gulfstream Cottages 336! This 2 bedroom, 2 bath cottage has furniture, electronics, and appliances, and is located is less than 5 minutes walking distance from the beach with an outdoor community pool.

This rental features:

--Bedroom #1: sleek contemporary furnishings, a king bed with a tempurpedic mattress and pillows, a computer desk, and a flat screen TV with Roku.

--Bedroom #2: 2 double beds with and a flat screen TV with Roku.

--Living room: traditional furnishings in the living area with a queen sleeper sofa, seating for five plus a dining table with seating for four and a flat screen TV with Roku, Netflix and a DVD player

--Fully equipped kitchen with granite counter tops, additional seating for two at the counter and is equipped with everything you need to prepare meals in for family and friends.

--Two full bathrooms, one upstairs and one downstairs

--High speed Wifi access

--Linens and towers, laundry and dryer

--Backyard with patio with a gas grill and table/chairs

--Private community pool 50 feet away in front of the cottage

--Free parking in front of the cottage

Relax on the back patio with seating for 6 and a gas grill to cook up burgers and steaks. Enjoy the manicured lush landscaped greens and on warm days plunge into the refreshing outdoor community swimming pool.

Gulfstream Cottages is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South on the southern side of Myrtle Beach, just minutes to all attractions, shopping and dining. Play a few rounds of golf in the Golf Capitol of the World with over 100 championship courses to choose from. Fill your wish lists at the two Tanger Outlets, Market Common and the assorted malls and shopping centers. Set sail for a high seas adventure on a fishing charter, kayaking and scuba diving. Family fun can't be topped at Family Kingdom Amusement Park with wood and steel rollercoasters and Splashes Waterfront Waterpark. Visit Broadway at the Beach for an assortment of fun dining choices and entertaining museums like WonderWorks and the Hollywood Wax Museum. Gulfstream Cottages offers the ideal location for a seaside getaway.

We also have multiple 2-and 3-bedroom cottages located in the same neighborhood, and multiple direct oceanfront 1- and 2-bedroom condos next to Boardwalk. Please let me know if you are interested in these oceanfront condos.

Other things to note
Please contact the owner before you book it if you are younger than 25 years old.

listing_name: Newly Updated, Clean Vacation Home!
description:
Newly updated floor, furniture, appliances and granite throughout with great private pool view. You will enjoy staying in a home not a vacation rental unit. Professionally cleaned before each guest arrives. Located in Myrtle Beach's premier 145-acre master planned community Kingston Plantation.

The space
If you are looking for a vacation stay in a true home not a rental property, I ask you to have a look. You won't be disappointed in the freshly painted, newly furnished and professionally cleaned 1128 square foot private Villa.

Some highlights and features:
* Full size dryer
* New semi-frame less glass shower doors in master and guest baths
* New top grain leather queen sleeper sofa with memory foam mattress mattress
* Matching top grain leather love seat
* New memory foam mattresses in master and guest (Jan 2022)

* Freshly painted trim throughout and new door hardware

You are sure to feel right at home as our guest when you stay in this spacious 1100+ square foot luxury villa with the feel of a resort stay without the hassle of check-in or wet sandy elevators. You are literally steps from the front door in one of the two parking spaces provided and just minutes from the ocean strolling down a landscaped, lighted walking paths or a minutes drive from ample parking beachfront.

KITCHEN
* All new Frigidaire stainless steel appliances. Smooth top stove, quiet dishwasher, built in microwave and 20 cubic foot refrigerator with filtered water ice maker.
* New toaster, 12 cup coffee maker, blender and Hamilton Beach Flex Brew Coffee Maker with full pot with reusable filter and k-cup options (K-cups not provided).
* All new non-stick pots and pans, china and silverware provided.

MASTER BEDROOM
* The bedroom is highlighted by a king sized bed with new comforter set and private bath with dual sinks and a jetted tub shower combination.
* For your convenience a brand new 32 inch High Definition LG LED TV and remote controlled ultra quiet DC direct drive fan with dimmable light.

GUEST BEDROOM
* Two twin beds with new comforter set and brand new 32 inch High Definition LG LED
* TV and remote controlled ultra quiet DC direct drive fan with dimmable light.

GUEST BATH
* Walk in shower and full size side by side washer and dryer.

LIVING AND DINING ROOM
* Brand new Pottery Barn inspired dining room table that can seat 6 comfortably as well as various end tables and coffee tables.
* Comfortable leather full-size sleeper sofa (for additional 2 guests) and matching recliner.

ENTERTAINMENT AND CONNECTIVITY
* Brand new large 50 inch LG High Definition LED TV with matching soundbar and subwoofer.
* Full HD with cable box with online program guide.
* Soundbar can be configured to sync with any bluetooth device to stream your own personal music collection.
* Blu Ray DVD player with Netflix.
* Free Time Warner internet access.

* Pet and Smoke free

Thanks for viewing our home, we are very proud of the changes we have made and look forward to sharing the warmth our relaxing villa provides. Isn't that what vacation is all about? Sit back enjoy, relax and be our guest.

Sport & Health Club:

Use of the on-site Sport & Health Club is NOT included in your rental rate. Should you choose to use the Sport & Health Club, it costs $10.00/person/day. Feel free to inquire with the Sport & Health Club staff about a possible weekly rate/pass.

*Direct Oceanfront unit.
*Indoor pool, lazy river, kiddie pool and hot tub

About the condo:
This is a direct oceanfront, 1100 sq ft, 2 bedroom/2 bathroom, 9th floor condo located in the most desirable and central location of Myrtle Beach. This condo offers a custom decorated Tommy Bahama decor, a full kitchen, washer and dryer in the unit, free wireless internet, a flat screen TV in every room and an incredible view of the Atlantic Ocean. Linens & towel are provided with this rental. The master bedroom has a king size bed with an in suite private bathroom. The second bedroom has two queen sized beds. In addition, the living room has a full sized pullout couch. The unit features a large private oceanfront balcony with unobstructed views of the ocean. Enjoy the extensive amenities, which include a full gym, game room, and 5 pools including indoor and outdoor heated pools, hot tub, indoor and outdoor kiddies' pools with a mushroom waterfall and bubbles, and a fun 170 ft lazy river. All pools offer gorgeous views of the beach and the ocean! Parking is located in the same building as the unit and provides the guest with 2 spots.

About the area:
There are many fun-filled family activities within a short distance from the condo. The Family Kingdom, a family theme park is only a short walk away. There’s also Ripley’s Aquarium featuring thousands of sea creatures. There are also miniature golf courses, shops, water parks, mini-race tracks and eateries all at your doorsteps. There are shows playing at the Carolina Opry Theater, The Legend, and Palace Theater.

Myrtle Beach is a golf haven with over a 100 golf courses to choose from, all within a short drive from the condo. There are many restaurants and shops to fit every taste. We’re certain that you’ll enjoy your stay in this beautiful 2 bedroom 2 bath oceanfront condo.

listing_name: 3BR/2BA Dunes Village, Indoor Waterpark, 8th Floor
description:
This resort is great for families as it has it's own private water parks. You’ll love my place because of the unobstructed views of the Atlantic Ocean and the central location. My place is great for families with kids, large groups, reunions and business travelers.

This is a 3 BR/2 BA unit with a king bed in the master and 2 queen beds in each of the other 2 bedrooms. We have a fully stocked kitchen, dining room, WIFI and a Flat Screen TVs in each bedroom/living room and a private balcony.

The space
Key Highlights:

*indoor water park included in rent
*unobstructed view of the ocean
*1 king bed and 4 queen beds with a sofa bed in the living room
*TVs in all the rooms
*free WIFI
*Large balcony with a view of the ocean
*located right on the beach with no streets to cross for beach access
*fully stocked kitchen with all the tools needed to cook all meals
*washer and dryer in the unit
*high chair and pack n play included with rent
*restaurants on site
*3 covered parking spots

Our units are being prepared and cleaned per CDC recommendations.

About the condo:
This is 1282 sq ft 3 bedroom/2 bathroom 8th floor condo located in the most desirable area of the north side of Myrtle Beach and sleeps up to 12 people comfortably. This condo offers a custom decorated Tommy Bahama decor, a granite countered full kitchen, washer and dryer in the unit, free wireless internet, a flat screen TV in every room with a DVD player and an incredible view of the Atlantic Ocean. Linens & towel are provided with this rental. Enjoy a great view of the Ocean from your master bedroom and the living area in this angled ocean view property. The resort is ideally situated in the exclusive north-end residential section of Myrtle Beach known as 'The Golden Mile', which adds to the level of luxury associated with your stay at the Dunes Village Resort. Our condominium features three bedrooms. The first is a master bedroom with a private bath and a king size bed. The other two bedrooms feature 2 queen-size beds in each with access to the second bathroom. The living area has a flat screen TV, dinning room and a fully equipped kitchen. There is also a washer/dryer in the unit and free WIFI.

Enjoy stunning oceanfront views from your private balcony. Take advantage of unlimited access to Dunes Village Resort's large indoor heated water park that includes a 250 ft Lazy River, three Jacuzzi hot tubs, two adult-size Water Slides, a children's pool and a game room with pool tables and other games. The Resort offers a fully equipped exercise room, a full-service restaurant that includes a lunch and dinner menu, pool bar and food service and Seattle's Best breakfast/coffee facility.

About the resort:
The Resort is located on the beach at 5300 N Ocean Blvd and considered to be one of the best resorts in Myrtle Beach. And the location is perfect--you’re just far enough from downtown so that you can enjoy some peace and quiet on the beach while still being close enough to all the major attractions. You’re only a 10-minute drive from downtown and 10-15 minutes from everything else in Myrtle Beach. There’s also plenty to do right by the resort or just a short walk over on Kings Highway/Business 17. The amenities in the resort are great too. There's a great gym and a game room plus 2 indoor water parks with tons of things to do as well as 6 outdoor pools, kiddie pools and SPAs, a 170’ Lazy River and a basketball court.

About the area:
There are many fun-filled family activities within a short distance from the condo. The Family Kingdom, a family theme park is only a short walk away. There’s also Ripley’s Aquarium featuring thousands of sea creatures. There are also miniature golf courses, shops, water parks, mini-race tracks and eateries all at your doorsteps. There are shows playing at the Carolina Opry Theater, The Legend, and Broadway at the Beach.

Myrtle Beach is a golf haven with over a 100 golf courses to choose from, all within a short drive from the condo. There are many restaurants and shops to fit every taste. We’re certain that you’ll enjoy your stay in this beautiful 3 bedroom oceanfront condo.

This property is Smoke Free. A $250.00 cleaning fee will apply if smoking occurs within a guest room or on the balcony.

This unit comes with 3 covered parking spaces.

Guests have access to all the amenities.

The space
This is a Beautiful Upper Level Direct Oceanfront Penthouse on the 14th Floor In The Atlantica Resort Located in the Downtown of Myrtle Beach. This Unique Condo Features A Large New Upgraded Fully Equipped Kitchen, A Large Living Area And Two Big Bedrooms Each With A Private Bath. Atlantica Resort is located in the heart of Myrtle Beach. It is just few blocks (few minutes walking distance) to the beautiful downtown - the new Beach Boardwalk, the great sky wheel and the pier. It's only about one mile to the Broadway, the convention center, Family Kingdom. It is about one mile to the shopping mall, movie theater, golf course and airport. This resort has been a favorite Myrtle Beach vacation destination for many years.

The master bedroom has 1 king-size bed, the guest bedroom has 2 queen-size beds. The new upgraded granite countertop kitchen is fully equipped with extra appliances, blender, coffee pot, toaster, and service for eight guests. The two upgraded full bathrooms have granite countertops.

The living room contains a queen size sleeper sofa, a single-size sofa, table with six chairs, FLAT SCREEN HD TV plus hi speed wireless internet connection right in the unit. Lots of linen and towels, service for 8, and everything you could want for a great vacation! The spacious balcony has a table and 2 chairs, is Oceanfront and THE VIEW IS INCREDIBLE! They are perfect for dolphin watching with your morning coffee.

listing_name: Comfortable 2-BR Cottage, 2 Blocks To Beach
description:
Welcome to Gulfstream Cottages MRV25! This 2 bedroom, 2 bath cottage has furniture, electronics, and appliances, and is located is less than 5 minutes walking distance from the beach with an outdoor community pool. It's located in a very quiet and safe neighborhood, only one block to the beach.
Gulfstream Cottage is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South; just minutes to all Myrtle Beach attractions, shopping and dining.

The space
Gulfstream Cottages MRV25 is a charming 2-bedroom 2-bath home situated just a short walk from the beach and very comfortable accommodations for up to 6 people. Gather your closest friends or relatives for a beach vacation on the south end of Myrtle Beach.

Entry from the covered front porch is a breeze with keyless entry. Warm vinyl plank flooring greets with a cozy sectional sofa with a queen-sized sleeper sofa, a coffee table and a large slat screen TV with Roku. The first floor level offers a laundry area with a washer and dryer. The bathroom upstairs features a warming electric bidet toilet a seat, a full-bathroom with a shower is on the first level.

Gather around the dining room table with seating for 4 to eat or play. The kitchen features black on black appliances complimented with smooth counters and is equipped with everything you need to prepare meals in for family and friends.

The bedrooms are both located on the second level. The first bedroom offers a king-sized bed while the second has a queen-sized bed. Both bedrooms have comfortable bedding and a television. There is a shared full bathroom with a bidet and shower. In a quiet corner of one bedroom is a desk with a flip down work top and easy access outlets. For extra sleeping space the owner has added two roll away beds.

Relax on the back patio with seating for 4 and a gas grill to cook up burgers and steaks. Enjoy the manicured lush landscaped greens and on warm days plunge into the refreshing outdoor community swimming pool.

Gulfstream Cottages is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South on the southern side of Myrtle Beach, just minutes to all attractions, shopping and dining. Play a few rounds of golf in the Golf Capitol of the World with over 100 championship courses to choose from. Fill your wish lists at the two Tanger Outlets, Market Common and the assorted malls and shopping centers. Set sail for a high seas adventure on a fishing charter, kayaking and scuba diving. Family fun can't be topped at Family Kingdom Amusement Park with wood and steel rollercoasters and Splashes Waterfront Waterpark. Visit Broadway at the Beach for an assortment of fun dining choices and entertaining museums like WonderWorks and the Hollywood Wax Museum. Gulfstream Cottages MRV25 offers the ideal location for a seaside getaway.

We also have multiple 2-and 3-bedroom cottages located in the same neighborhood, and multiple direct oceanfront 1- and 2-bedroom condos next to Boardwalk. Please let me know if you are interested in these oceanfront condos.

listing_name: Meticulous Oceanfront 1Bedroom Suite/ Jetted tub!
description:
Dive into luxury with our oceanfront suite! Picture this: two cozy queen beds in the bedroom, plus a convenient murphy bed in the living room – all waiting for you on the 9th floor of the Boardwalk resort.Whip up a delicious meal in our fully stocked kitchen whenever the mood strikes. And when relaxation calls, step onto your private oceanfront balcony with a steaming cup of coffee in hand. With every detail designed for your comfort and convenience, there's no better time to book your stay!

The space
Experience the ultimate relaxation in our suite, where comfort meets convenience! With two queen-size beds and a cozy Murphy bed, there's room for up to six guests to unwind and make unforgettable memories. Step into a serene ambiance that instantly feels like home, offering the perfect retreat after a day of beachside adventures. And oh, the view from the ocean-front balcony – it's truly a sight to behold, with the majestic Atlantic Ocean stretching out before you. This is the scene you've been dreaming of, and it's finally within reach.

Before you hit the sandy shores, take advantage of our fully equipped kitchen to whip up delicious meals and snacks. Upon your arrival, you'll find all the basic condo supplies you need to kickstart your vacation on the right foot. And when evening falls, there's nothing quite like sipping hot chocolate on the balcony, serenaded by the gentle breeze and the soothing sound of the waves crashing against the shore. It's the perfect way to unwind and reconnect with loved ones amidst the beauty of nature.

Nestled on the pristine beaches of the Atlantic Ocean, our Oceanfront resort offers unparalleled access to Myrtle Beach's most iconic attractions. Just 5.6 miles from Myrtle Beach State Park and a mere 1.2 miles from the bustling Myrtle Beach Boardwalk and Promenade, you're never far from the action. Plus, with Myrtle Beach International Airport a convenient 4.3 miles away, getting here is a breeze.

At Boardwalk Resort, we pride ourselves on providing the perfect blend of space, comfort, and convenience for you and your loved ones. Whether you're lounging by the on-site swimming pools, enjoying elevator access for easy transportation, or taking advantage of our convenient parking options, every aspect of your stay is designed to exceed your expectations. And with breathtaking oceanfront views greeting you from your private balcony, relaxation is always just a step away.

Planning your next beach holiday has never been easier! Treat yourself to an oceanfront vacation condo where everything you need is right at your fingertips. From indoor and outdoor swimming pools to a lazy river and kiddie pool, there's something for everyone to enjoy at Boardwalk Resort. So why wait? Reserve your slice of paradise today and make memories that will last a lifetime!


Start making plans for your ideal Myrtle Beach family trip right now!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire apartment. They can also use the pools and hot tubs located on the bottom level of this building. There is outdoor pool, lazy river, kids pool as well as indoor pool and hot tub.

Other things to note
All suites managed by us have code locks for the doors, so there is no need to waste time checking in at the front lobby, all access codes will be sent to you on the day of check in by 4pm. Parking passes as well as pool wristbands (where required) will already be waiting for you in your suite. All rooms are fully furnished and equipped with basic kitchen utensils such as silverware and plates/bowls.

For anyone wishing to bring their dog, only our suites at Patricia Grand allow them. Inquire for more information on these units.

Upon check in, linens for each bed and towels for each person will be available in the room, along with starter items such as trash bags, toilet paper, and soaps. Any additional items needed will come at a small fee. Items such as beach chairs, umbrellas, etc. are not provided by us but can be rented from the lifeguards on the beach.

Our locations are privately owned and rented by off-site management, so all questions or requests must me made by contacting us. The front desks will have none of your information and will not assist you.

In the event of mandatory evacuation order for our area full refund will be issued. We will have no further liability regarding your reservation. In the event of inclement weather in other areas prohibiting guests from getting to Myrtle Beach, there will be no refund. We will have no liability with respect to the reservation. We recommend travelers purchase insurance, especially during the months with higher potential for inclement weather (e.g. hurricane season).

listing_name: Upscale Oceanview 1Br Dog Friendly!
description:
Immerse yourself in the enchanting experience of staying in a charming 1 bedroom suite situated on the 11th floor of the pet-friendly Patricia Grand Resort, offering a mesmerizing view of the vast blue ocean that stretches as far as the eye can see. This inviting suite serves as a sanctuary for a wide range of experiences, whether you seek exciting family adventures, intimate romantic getaways, indulgent spa retreats, or exhilarating golf outings.

The space
Picture yourself waking up in a comfortable king-size bed with a bonus Murphy bed for extra guests, surrounded by brand-new appliances in a room that opens up to a mesmerizing ocean view. Every morning brings the gift of a breathtaking sunrise over the waves – a perfect start to your day.

Kick off your family escapade in Myrtle Beach at our sought-after resort nestled in the heart of the Grand Strand. With its prime beachfront location on the North Atlantic Ocean, just a stone's throw away from Myrtle Beach State Park, and a short drive from the vibrant Myrtle Beach Boardwalk and Promenade, you're in for a memorable vacation filled with fun and relaxation.

Indulge in the welcoming atmosphere of our resort, offering a wide array of oceanfront dining options, indoor and outdoor amenities, and spacious suites catering to all budgets and group sizes. Whether you're splashing in the kid-friendly indoor pool, strolling along the beach, or admiring the stunning views of the Atlantic, you'll find endless opportunities for enjoyment.

From lively karaoke nights and comedy clubs to thrilling amusement park rides and water slides, the fun never stops. Explore the charming shops and delectable eateries at Barefoot Landing, or embark on a nature adventure with a garden walk or zoo visit. For a bird's eye view of the coast, hop on a helicopter tour or take a spin on the iconic Myrtle Beach SkyWheel – the options for excitement are endless.

Your beach vacation along the Eastern Seaboard promises laughter, relaxation, and unforgettable memories waiting to be made. Come experience the joy of seaside living and book your stay at the enchanting Patricia Grand Resort today.

Small dogs are welcome with prior approval. (Must be up to 40 lbs, dog fee $25 per dog, per night. Restricted breeds are: Rottweilers, Pit Bull Terrier, Staffordshire Terrier, Dobermans, Boxers, German Shepherds, Presa Canario, Akita, Wolf-hybrid, Mastiff, Cane Corso, Great Dane, Alaskan Malamute, Husky, and Chow Chows. ONLY DOGS are allowed. No Cats Allowed. No exceptions). No need to board your furry friend while you're away when they can tag along for the whole trip.

Wait no more! Book it now!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire apartment, as well as all resort amenities.

Other things to note
All suites managed by us have code locks for the doors, so there’s no need to waste time checking in at the front lobby, all access codes will be sent to you on the day of check in by 4pm.

Parking passes (2) will already be waiting for you in your suite.

All rooms are fully furnished and equipped with basic kitchen utensils such as silverware and plates/bowls.

For anyone wishing to bring their dog, only our suites at Patricia Grand allow them. Inquire for more information on these units.

Upon check in, linens for each bed and towels for each person will be available in the room, along with starter items such as trash bags, toilet paper, and soaps. Any additional items needed will come at a small fee.

Items such as beach chairs, umbrellas, etc. are not provided by us but can be rented from the lifeguards on the beach.

Our locations are privately owned and rented by off-site management, so all questions or requests must be made by contacting us. The front desks will have none of your information and will not assist you.

In the event of mandatory evacuation order for our area full refund will be issued. We will have no further liability regarding your reservation. In the event of inclement weather in other areas prohibiting guests from getting to Myrtle Beach, there will be no refund. We will have no liability with respect to the reservation. We recommend travelers purchase insurance, especially during the months with higher potential for inclement weather (e.g. hurricane season).

description:
Welcome to Gulfstream Cottages 350! This 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom cottage has furniture, electronics, and appliances, and is located is less than 5 minutes walking distance from the beach with an outdoor community pool. It's located in a very quiet and safe neighborhood, only two blocks to the beach.
Gulfstream Cottage is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South; just minutes to all Myrtle Beach attractions, shopping and dining.

The space
This rental features:
--Bedroom #1: A King-size bed and a Roku TV, upstairs.
--Bedroom #2: Two full-size beds and a HD flat screen TV with Roku, upstairs.
--Bedroom #3: A Queen-size bed and a HD flat screen TV with Roku, downstairs.
--Living room: traditional furnishings in the living area with a queen sleeper sofa, a cozy chair with ottoman seating for four plus a dining table with seating for four and a flat screen TV with Roku and a DVD player

--Backyard with patio with a gas grill and chairs

Enjoy the manicured lush landscaped greens and on warm days plunge into the refreshing outdoor community swimming pool.

Gulfstream Cottages is located between 19th and 20th Avenues South on the southern side of Myrtle Beach, just minutes to all attractions, shopping and dining. Play a few rounds of golf in the Golf Capitol of the World with over 100 championship courses to choose from. Fill your wish lists at the two Tanger Outlets, Market Common and the assorted malls and shopping centers. Set sail for a high seas adventure on a fishing charter, kayaking and scuba diving. Family fun can't be topped at Family Kingdom Amusement Park with wood and steel rollercoasters and Splashes Waterfront Waterpark. Visit Broadway at the Beach for an assortment of fun dining choices and entertaining museums like WonderWorks and the Hollywood Wax Museum. Gulfstream Cottages MRV50 offers the ideal location for a seaside getaway.

We also have multiple 2-and 3-bedroom cottages located in the same neighborhood, and multiple direct oceanfront 1- and 2-bedroom condos next to Boardwalk. Please let me know if you are interested in these oceanfront condos.

If you are 25 years old younger, please contact the owner before you book it.

listing_name: Ocean-Front 1Br Myrtle Beach [Upgrades]
description:
Welcome to the beach! A true OCEAN-FRONT condo on the Golden Mile!
Recently updated 1 Bedroom, Full Kitchen and Bath.

We update our cleaning methods and make upgrades every few months for a clean, comfortable, and enjoyable stay.

I provide beach chairs, towels, and linens for the bed at no charge.
Sleeps 4-6. Enjoy pool/hot tub, patio, parking with elevator access, easy key-code entry. This is my home and I'm constantly upgrading the condo here in Myrtle Beach's best neighborhood.

The space
Welcome to our home! We love it here and hope you do too!

We hope to provide you with a clean, comfortable, and relaxed stay. My family and I love this quiet, well-kept secret in the best stretch of Myrtle Beach!

This ocean-front neighborhood is a hidden gem; a stretch of beautiful homes as a break in Myrtle Beach's miles of towers. An incredible ocean-front 1-bedroom condo in one of the best neighborhoods in Myrtle Beach, known as the golden mile. Less than 10 minutes from Broadway at the Beach, downtown Myrtle, dozens of golf courses, fine and casual dining, grocery stores, and amusement parks. It's a quick über or taxi from the airport and quick access to major in a quiet and nicely maintained section of the beach.

The true 1 bedroom is spacious & updated with a big, private patio, king bed, full kitchen, pull-out sofa, an extra air mattress, and laundry on site. Plus, you're up on the 19th floor, giving you rare privacy with a view. We usually sit in the kitchen and watch for dolphins in the afternoon!

Traveling with others? It can sleep 4 adults easily, or 6 people if you are traveling with kids or couples. I provide an air mattress and pull-out couch.

With a full kitchen you can make dinner for your whole family while you relax on the spacious patio. Unlike many of Myrtle Beach's condo buildings, no other patios look into yours, so you feel like it's your private beach!

Parking is provided free of charge. The parking lot provides a few levels of covered parking. Our building does not allow motorcycles however. NOTE, the turning radius inside is very small. Navigating through the ramps can be tricky with a larger car. There is street parking available nearby. Please also be aware of local signs. Our parking passes are for the building only and won't suffice for restricted spots off the building property (i.e. streets where signs list restrictions).

You have access to an indoor pool, hot tub, and sauna as well as an outdoor pool and sun deck. The lobby is clean, renovated, and well lit with couches, tables, and chairs where you and your guests can relax out of the sun. The beautiful Ocean Forest Plaza is maintained year-round by an active HOA with 3 fast elevators, trash chutes (seems like no big deal, but we've come to really appreciate not taking bags of trash down stairs!), and on-site security. The lobby has a pull-through covered entry so you can unload your luggage in the rain and stay dry!

Of course, we have to mention that there's fast internet and cable. You've gotta post a photo of the sunset ;) or kick back and watch a movie with dinner!

Okay, have I sold you on the place yet?
-the front door uses a key code, so no need to bring keys to the beach or check in to pick up keys.
-there's a/c and heating.
-it has tile floors throughout for easy cleaning.
-we have a toaster!

Check out the pictures, and then pick your dates!

I'll make it as easy as possible and if you don't see something in the photos that I can provide, just ask!! How can I help you enjoy the beach!?

Let's talk soon,
Sincerely-Richard

Guest access
Indoor and Outdoor Pool, Hot Tub, Laundry Facility, Free Parking, ATM, Private Patio

Other things to note
Linens are provided.
I also have beach chairs you can use, cooking supplies in the kitchen, patio furniture, and an air mattress if you need extra space.
We are not responsible for parking fines or towing.
There is a small road that runs in front of the building between the building and the beach, but there is a crosswalk and it is rarely busy.
Key-code entry.
Please stay safe and follow all laws. We also have planned more thorough cleanings to ensure your health, but again please note neither the owner nor building can be held liable for any health issues that may arise.

listing_name: Oceanfront Penthouse - 2 Bedroom
description:
EASY QUICK CHECK IN...

Our oceanfront penthouse has a great view of the ocean. It is only minutes away from the some of the hottest attractions along the Grand Strand, including Broadway at the Beach (1.6 miles to be exact...cheap Uber ride), Family Kingdom, Market Common, and the Myrtle Beach International Airport. It's walking distance to the sky wheel, boardwalk, shops, restaurants and bars. Oh yeah, and very close walking distance to Starbucks.

The space
This unit is the penthouse, so you will be on the penthouse floor and have more windows than the other condos in this building. The condo is family friendly. My condo is located in the Atlantica Resort which consists of 2 towers with a little plot of land between the 2. My unit is in the North Tower. The parking lot is located at the second block in.

Guest access
This unit is in Atlantica's North Tower which has a pool and beach access. You will also have access to the South Tower which has the registration desk, indoor pool, hot tub, kiddie pool and lazy river. There's a small lot of land in between the 2 towers.

Other things to note
The cleaning fee includes the full cleaning after you leave and inspection. It also includes all the clean linens including pillow cases, bed sheets, comforter, towels hand towels and wash cloths when you check in, but I recommend that you bring your own beach towels. This is not a hotel, so there is not a daily cleaning or linen exchange during your stay. Sorry, there’s no washer or dryer onsite. There is a smart TV, but unfortunately connecting it to the internet is not supported and I recommend using cable.


I personally go down to Myrtle Beach every January & February to complete all updating, painting and minor repairs. I do not charge guests for any normal wear and tear damage that occurs during your stay. There's no need to send me pictures of any scuff marks or minor issues, but please let me know if you have any issues that you'd like repaired during your stay.




Disclaimer that I put on all listings regarding construction work, smart TVs and contact time:
- Renovation season is usually 9/1-3/1 and every condo is personally owned, so a neighboring condo may do renovations throughout the day (less during the weekend). Myrtle Beach does have a noise ordinance from 11pm-7am, feel free to report this to the police if you have a noise complaint during those times. If there's construction noise during 7am-11pm during off season, there's not much that I can do except ask the owners to be a little quieter.
- I prefer non-smart TVs in my units since they're easier to control, but as TVs fail, the only option is to replace them with smart TVs. I own several condos and have TVs in every bedroom and living room, there are so many makes and models, it's hard for me to provide smart TV support for each one remotely. I recommend using the TVs for cable options and cannot support smart TV functions. The cleaning company tests the power, volume and cable channels between every check in, but if you are having issues with the cable not working, please let me know.
The sleeper sofa in the living room is not usable currently.

- Even though you can check in at anytime after 4pm since the condo is code access, I usually sleep 12am-7am, so I recommend checking in before 12am in case you have any questions. If you have any questions, please re-read the check in instructions. All of my units have high traffic and these instructions have worked for many others, so everything you should need to know is in there. If you have any questions that are non-urgent, please send them through Airbnb. If you have an emergency 12am-7am, feel free to call me, my phone is usually on, but in focus mode. To bypass focus mode, call me 2x within 2 minutes or select bypass focus mode in a text. If the emergency is a noise complaint from 11pm-7am, feel free to report it to the police.
- I do have a strict cancellation policy, so I highly recommend travel insurance in case of emergency.

Welcome to our charming South Carolina retreat! As is common in this warm and humid climate, you may encounter some insects and reptiles. Rest assured, we have a dedicated exterminator who maintains the property regularly. During the fall and winter months, these critters may seek shelter from the cold indoors. Should you happen upon any inside the condo, kindly inform us promptly, and we'll arrange for immediate attention from our extermination team. We're committed to a proactive approach and swift response to ensure your comfort. Please note, however, that no refunds will be provided in the event of an insect or reptile sighting. Your understanding is greatly appreciated!

Close your eyes and feel the warmth of the sunshine down on your body as it gently warms your skin. The waves gently crash closer to the shoreline, and you can smell the wonderful fresh air. Boardwalk Resort provides space and comfort and convenience while accommodating your family and friends where you can all see the crashing waves and hear the seagulls taking flight on the beachfront.

For your next beach holiday, treat yourself to an oceanfront vacation condo and relax knowing that everything you need is just at your fingertips. Vehicle Restrictions:
Trailers and recreational vehicles—including campers, motor homes, buses, jet skis, boats, motorcycles, mopeds, scooters, Slingshot-style vehicles, and commercial vehicles—are not permitted to be parked or stored on the property. These vehicles may only be driven directly into a garage and must remain fully enclosed with the garage door closed. Please note that fines may be issued for any violations.

listing_name: Condo with balcony, beach & resort access
description:
Welcome to your oceanfront Myrtle Beach escape, where relaxed days unfold above the shoreline and the sea is always in view.

- Sleeps 8 | 2 bedrooms | 3 beds | 2 baths
- 19th-floor oceanfront condo w/ private balcony
- Shared pool, hot tub & fire pit
- Climbing wall, bowling alley & playground
- Full kitchen, washer/dryer & smart lock check-in

The space
Soft light shifts across the Atlantic as waves roll steadily toward shore, their rhythm carrying up to the 19th floor. You wake to the ocean stretching wide beyond the glass, salt air drifting in through the balcony doors, and the sense that the day can unfold at an unhurried pace shaped by water and sky.

The space
Set high above Myrtle Beach’s shoreline, this oceanfront condo offers space for up to eight guests with two bedrooms and two full bathrooms. From the living area to the bedrooms, the coastline stays in view, grounding your stay in the presence of the sea. The layout balances shared gathering areas with private spaces, making it easy to spend time together while still having room to unwind.

Sleeping arrangements
The primary bedroom features a king bed, ocean views, and a private bathroom, creating a calm retreat at the end of the day. The second bedroom includes two queen beds and room-darkening shades for restful nights. Bed linens, extra pillows, and blankets are provided to keep your stay comfortable.

Living area
The open living room looks directly out over the water, offering a relaxed place to watch TV, read, or simply sit with the view as the light changes throughout the day. A dedicated workspace and Wifi support remote work or planning local outings without pulling you away from the coastal atmosphere.

Kitchen and dining
A full kitchen allows you to prepare meals during your stay, whether it’s a quick breakfast before heading out or a shared dinner back at the condo. There’s space to dine indoors at the table, or you can step onto the balcony and enjoy meals with the ocean just beyond the railing.

Outdoor living and resort amenities
Your private balcony overlooks the beach and water below, offering a front-row seat to Myrtle Beach’s shoreline from above. Beyond the condo, shared resort amenities include a pool, hot tub, fire pit, and shared beach access. Families will appreciate the outdoor playground, climbing wall, and bowling alley, while elevators make moving through the building easy.

Comfort and convenience
The condo includes air conditioning and heating, an in-unit washer and dryer, and a private entrance with smart lock self check-in. Free parking is available on the premises and on the street. Bathroom essentials and towels are provided, helping keep packing simple for longer or shorter stays alike.

Neighborhood
Located along Myrtle Beach’s coastline, the condo places you close to the Boardwalk, Family Kingdom Amusement Park, and 2nd Avenue Pier. Restaurants, shops, and entertainment options nearby make it easy to mix beach time with exploring the area.

Perfect for
Families, couples, and friends looking for an oceanfront stay with resort amenities, shared beach access, and a comfortable home base above the shoreline.

Guest access
Abundant amenities away you at this beachfront resort. Features include both indoor pools, lazy river ride, spacious pool deck and social areas, an Oceanfront pool, an indoor pool, and a waterfall. Indoor pool with cascading double waterfall. Children's Interactive splash and play area for the entier family to enjoy! AND BEST OF ALL FREE WIFI!

Other things to note
This is a personally owned condo and is not a hotel room, please treat as you would your home.

The door is managed by a code lock and you will not have to check-in at the front desk. You will receive this code the day or your arrival(in the welcome email that is sent to you). So no waiting in those long lines to check-in.

Your stay includes linens for beds, towels, and washcloths, also STARTER trash bags, hand soap, and toilet paper.

Umbrellas and chairs may also be rented on the beach from the lifeguards.

... remember since this is not part of the hotel you will not receive daily maid service... If you would like daily, bi-weekly maid service or towel exchange this can be arranged for an additional fee.

Additional Amenities include -
* Hairdryer
* FREE Onsite Parking
* Indoor Pools and Hot Tubs
* HEATED Pools
* 24/7 Onsite Security, Guest service via text, email, or phone

Resort Amenities include -
- Indoor Heated Pools
- Indoor / Outdoor Hot tubs
- Outdoor Lazy River
- Ice and Vending Machines
- FREE WIFI

You will have full access to all these listed above.

listing_name: Walk to the beach, boardwalk and Skywheel *Pool
description:
Park the car and enjoy one of the best locations in Myrtle Beach! Our comfortable condo is located just across the street from the beach and within walking distance to the Myrtle Beach Boardwalk, SkyWheel, restaurants, bars, ice cream shops, Starbucks, and grocery stores. Broadway at the Beach is just minutes away.

Enjoy fresh ocean air, beautiful beach days, and vibrant nightlife all within walking distance.

Perfect for longer stays with a full kitchen and in-unit washer and dryer.

The space
Our condo is more than just a rental—it’s a personal retreat that we also enjoy when we’re not hosting guests. We’ve thoughtfully furnished the space with comfortable seating, tasteful décor, and plush bedding to create a warm, relaxing environment that feels like home, not a hotel. We take pride in keeping it clean, cozy, and welcoming for every guest.

Please note that the condo accommodates a maximum of 4 guests, as the building strictly enforces occupancy limits.

The unit features two queen-size beds, a spacious sectional that can comfortably sleep additional guests, and an air mattress if needed. For your convenience, there is also a private washer and dryer available inside the condo for your use. 😊

Guest access
For your convenience, we offer self check in! When you arrive at the lobby, simply press 62 on the intercom for entry. We will quickly allow you access to the building. The code for the smartlock will be sent to you upon check-in.

Other things to note
The trash goes in the dumpster beside the parking lot by the plants. Please empty trash before leaving. Thank you!

listing_name: Quiet Townhome One Block to Ocean
description:
Just one block to the ocean, this end unit has two bedrooms, 2.5 baths and a private gated patio for relaxing after a long day at the beach.

The space
This 2 bedroom, 2.5 bath town home is perfect for guests that want to relax in a quiet area of Myrtle Beach. Walk just one block to the beach to enjoy the ocean, or walk to get a bite at some of the area's best restaurants.

We have beach supplies for two, and a shower on the enclosed patio to rinse off the salt water and sand, as well as a line to dry your beach things.

We have all the basics in our kitchen (pots/pans, microwave, toaster), so you can take advantage of the local produce while you're here.

Guest access
Enjoy this quiet end-unit all to yourself. Sip your morning coffee or an evening cocktail on the private patio. Should you wish to enjoy the beach, we have two beach chairs, towels and a beach umbrella for your your stay.

The living room and master bedroom both have televisions with Roku, streaming cable, and VHS/DVD players (yes, we too are retro). We also have password-protected wifi, so you never have to be too far from your Netflix.

The washing machine and dryer are available for you to use, so you can pack light.

Other things to note
No pets, please (HOA rules). Respect our neighbors and city-wide noise ordinance, so no house parties or loud music. Our neighborhood has quiet time past 10pm.

During summer months, firework displays are common up and down the beach, from about 9pm to 10pm.

listing_name: Upgraded 2-br Oceanfront End Unit in Boardwalk
description:
This is a Beautiful Upper Level Direct Oceanfront End Unit Condo on the 12th Floor In The Atlantica Resort Located in the Downtown of Myrtle Beach. This Unique Condo Features A Fully Equipped Kitchen, A Living Area And Two Bedrooms Each With A Private Bath. You'll Appreciate The Amazing Unobstructed Beach And Ocean Views From The Oversize Balcony. You Even Can Watch The Ocean From The Oceanfront Master Bedroom. Enjoy Your Morning Coffee As You Watch A Spectacular Sunrise Over The Blue Atlantic.

The space
This is a Beautiful Upper Level Direct Oceanfront End Unit Condo on the 12th Floor In The Atlantica Resort Located in the Downtown of Myrtle Beach. This Unique Condo Features A Fully Equipped Kitchen, A Living Area And Two Bedrooms Each With A Private Bath. You'll Appreciate The Amazing Unobstructed Beach And Ocean Views From The Oversize Balcony. You Even Can Watch The Ocean From The Oceanfront Master Bedroom. Enjoy Your Morning Coffee As You Watch A Spectacular Sunrise Over The Blue Atlantic. Feel The Cooling Chill Of A Fresh Sea Breeze As You Relax In The Summer Sun. This Condo Has Everything A Vacationing Family Needs Including A Washer And Dryer.

Atlantica Resort is located in the heart of Myrtle Beach. It is just few blocks (few minutes walking distance) to the beautiful downtown - the new Beach Boardwalk, the great sky wheel and the pier. It's only about half to one mile to the Broadway, the convention center, Family Kingdom. It is about one to two miles to the shopping mall, movie theater, golf course and airport. This resort has been a favorite Myrtle Beach vacation destination for many years.

The oceanfront master bedroom has 1 king-size bed, the guest bedroom has 1 queen-size and 1 full-size beds. The kitchen is fully equipped with extra appliances, blender, coffee pot, toaster, and service for eight guests.

The living room contains a queen size sleeper sofa, a single-size sofa, table with six chairs, FLAT SCREEN Roku TV, electric fireplace plus hi speed wireless internet connection right in the unit. Lots of linen and towels, service for 8, and everything you could want for a great vacation! The spacious balcony has a table and 2 chairs, is Oceanfront and THE VIEW IS INCREDIBLE! They are perfect for dolphin watching with your morning coffee.

Amenities to make your Oceanfront condo feel like home away from home include:

• Kitchen with Refrigerator

• Dishwasher

• Stove

• Oven

• Microwave

• Coffeemaker

• Cookware and Dishes

• Dining Area

• Washer and Dryer

• Full Baths

• Flat Panel TVs in Living Room and Bedrooms

• Iron and Board

ALL RESORT AMENITIES ARE INCLUDED: Amenities on site include an enclosed indoor heated pool, a outdoor pool, a lazy river, kiddie pool, outer door and indoor large whirl spas, and an indoor cascading 10 foot waterfall. All are heated and enclosed in the winter (Nov-May approx.) for year round enjoyment. Next door to the indoor amenities is our one of a kind Atlantica Beach Club. The Beach Club features two meeting areas for small groups and separate private Men and Women lockers with showers and restrooms. Perfect for early arrivals and/or extra time at the beach before changing clothes on your trip back home.

We can accommodate last minute guests. We hope to build long term friendships with our guests and hope you will give us and our unit an opportunity to impress you!

** THIS IS A RENT DIRECTLY BY OWNER PROPERTY - (Not the Hotel Property Mgt Co.) -Booking from a direct Owner will make all the difference in your vacation stay!

We also have multiple direct oceanfront 2-bedroom condos in this resort, multiple 2- and 3-bedroom cottages in a very quiet new neighborhood. They were built in 2013 and only 2 blocks to the beach. They can host 8 guests each. We also have direct oceanfront condos. Please let me know if you are interested in these properties.

description:
Direct oceanfront 1 BR/1 BA fully furnished unit at Boardwalk Resort, the new tower. This unit has an oceanfront living room & balcony. This is the only handicap accessible unit in the resort. Other features include 2 queen beds in the bedroom, a kitchen, 2 flat screen TVs, a murphy bed which is full size & wireless internet and offers an array of amenities including in/outdoor pools, hot tubs, lazy river, kiddie pool, oceanfront lawn area. Located near the sky wheel, boardwalk, piers, golf.

The space
Key Highlights:

*Direct Oceanfront unit
*Indoor pool, lazy river, kiddie pool and hot tub
*Large outdoor pool and sitting area
*2 queen beds and 1 full Murphy bed in the living room
*TVs in all the rooms
*free WIFI
*located right on the beach with no streets to cross for beach access
*fully stocked kitchen with all the tools needed to cook all meals
*1 parking spot

The rent includes a fully equipped kitchen, free Internet, linens and towels, the use of all resort amenities and 1 free parking spot.

About the condo:
This unit is a large 1bedroom/1bathroom with 2 queen beds in the bedroom and a double Murphy bed in the large oceanfront living room, a direct oceanfront balcony off the living room with spectacular views of the Atlantic, a fully stocked kitchen, a TV in the bedroom and a Smart flatscreen TV in the living room.

About the resort:
The Boardwalk resort is located on the beach at 2300 North Ocean Blvd at 23th Ave North and considered to be one of the best locations in Myrtle Beach - you’re just far enough from downtown so that you can enjoy some peace and quiet on the beach while still being close enough to all the major attractions. You’re only 7 blocks to Broadway at the Beach, where you can find many restaurants, magi-quest, the aquarium, IMAX theatre, palace theatre , hard rock cafe , retail shops and much more . It is located 4 blocks to the convention center and a few blocks to the boardwalk. There’s also plenty to do right by the resort or just a short walk over on Kings Highway/Business 17.

You must be 25 years old to rent this unit.

This is a non-smoking building and you will be charged a $250 fine if you smoke in the unit or on the balcony.

All the onsite amenities are available to our guests.

listing_name: Inviting Oceanfront 1Br with Jetted Garden tub!
description:
Discover the ultimate getaway spot nestled on the 9th floor of the vibrant Boardwalk resort, right in the bustling heart of Myrtle Beach. With its prime location and array of amenities, this suite offers the perfect blend of convenience, comfort, and charm for your Myrtle Beach getaway. Whether you're seeking relaxation, adventure, or a bit of both, you'll find it all right here, waiting to welcome you with open arms. Book your stay today and let the adventure begin!

The space
Indulge in the perfect Myrtle Beach escape with this amazing suite, featuring not one, not two, but two queen-size beds plus a convenient Murphy bed, comfortably accommodating up to six guests. Settle into the cozy ambiance and feel right at home from the moment you arrive. And oh, that oceanfront balcony! It's like stepping into your own personal postcard, with sweeping views of the majestic Atlantic Ocean stretching out before you. It's the scene you've been dreaming of, just waiting for you to enjoy.


Before you hit the beach for a day of sun-soaked adventures, why not whip up some delicious meals and snacks in the fully equipped kitchen? You'll find everything you need right at your fingertips, including basic condo supplies to get you started. And when evening falls, there's nothing better than sipping a steaming cup of hot chocolate while you listen to the soothing sound of the ocean breeze.

Nestled on the beachfront, this Oceanfront resort is perfectly positioned for you to make the most of your Myrtle Beach getaway. With attractions like the Myrtle Beach State Park and the bustling Boardwalk and Promenade just a stone's throw away, you'll never be far from the action. Plus, with Myrtle Beach International Airport just a short drive away, getting here is a breeze.


At Boardwalk Resort, comfort, convenience, and space come together to create the ultimate beachfront retreat for you and your loved ones. Whether you're watching the crashing waves from your balcony or listening to the joyful calls of seagulls as they take flight, you'll be surrounded by the beauty of the beachfront.

When it comes to planning your next beach holiday, why settle for anything less than perfection? Treat yourself to an oceanfront vacation condo and enjoy all the comforts of home right at your fingertips. From elevator access to on-site swimming pools and parking, every convenience is yours to enjoy.

And let's not forget about the amenities! With options like indoor and outdoor pools, a lazy river, kiddie pool, and hot tub, there's something for everyone at Boardwalk Resort. Whether you're seeking a refreshing dip or a relaxing soak, you'll find it all right here.

So why wait? Book now and get ready to make memories that will last a lifetime!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire apartment. They can also use the pools and hot tubs located on the bottom level of this building. There is outdoor pool, lazy river, kids pool as well as indoor pool and hot tub.

Other things to note
All suites managed by us have code locks for the doors, so there is no need to waste time checking in at the front lobby, all access codes will be sent to you on the day of check in by 4pm. Parking passes as well as pool wristbands (where required) will already be waiting for you in your suite. All rooms are fully furnished and equipped with basic kitchen utensils such as silverware and plates/bowls.

For anyone wishing to bring their dog, only our suites at Patricia Grand allow them. Inquire for more information on these units.

Upon check in, linens for each bed and towels for each person will be available in the room, along with starter items such as trash bags, toilet paper, and soaps. Any additional items needed will come at a small fee. Items such as beach chairs, umbrellas, etc. are not provided by us but can be rented from the lifeguards on the beach.

Our locations are privately owned and rented by off-site management, so all questions or requests must me made by contacting us. The front desks will have none of your information and will not assist you.

In the event of mandatory evacuation order for our area full refund will be issued. We will have no further liability regarding your reservation. In the event of inclement weather in other areas prohibiting guests from getting to Myrtle Beach, there will be no refund. We will have no liability with respect to the reservation. We recommend travelers purchase insurance, especially during the months with higher potential for inclement weather (e.g. hurricane season).

In the living room, you'll find ample seating arrangements for your travel companions. A comfortable sofa extends into a pullout bed for additional sleeping and the armchair is perfect for relaxing with a good book. description:

The space
• 9th-floor condo with stunning direct views of the Atlantic Ocean
• Spacious 3-bedroom layout plus sleeper sofa — perfect for families or groups
• Fully equipped kitchen with granite countertops and in-unit washer/dryer

Welcome to this 3-bedroom, 3-bath oceanfront condo located at The Island Resort in beautiful Myrtle Beach. This bright and elegant retreat offers breathtaking Atlantic Ocean views, luxurious accommodations, and the perfect setting for a memorable beach vacation.

The fully equipped kitchen features full-size appliances, granite countertops, and everything needed to prepare meals during your stay. The open living and dining area provides comfortable seating and access to the balcony, where you can enjoy morning coffee with ocean views or relax after a day at the beach. A sleeper sofa in the living room provides additional sleeping space for extra guests.

The primary bedroom includes a King bed, flat-screen TV, balcony access, and an en-suite bathroom with granite countertops, double vanities, Jacuzzi tub, and walk-in shower. The second bedroom features a King bed that can be converted into two twin beds upon request, while the third bedroom offers two Double beds. This layout makes the condo ideal for families, friends, or multiple couples traveling together.

The Bed Setup:
• Primary Bedroom: 1 King
• Guest Bedroom 1: 1 King (convertible to 2 Twins upon request)
• Guest Bedroom 2: 2 Double Beds
• Living Room: Sleeper Sofa

Additional Notes
• Luxury linen package included

The Island Resort is a well-established oceanfront property offering an extensive selection of amenities. On-site features include indoor and outdoor pools, lazy river, hot tubs, children’s splash pool, fitness center, oceanfront tanning lawn, and on-site dining at the award-winning Cypress Room. Guests enjoy direct beach access and a relaxed atmosphere in a quiet, family-friendly section of Myrtle Beach.

Area Attractions
Located in a family-friendly area along the Grand Strand, this property provides easy access to many of Myrtle Beach’s top destinations:
• Broadway at the Beach
• Barefoot Landing
• Tanger Outlets
• Carolina Opry
• Alabama Theatre
• Myrtle Beach Boardwalk
• Golf courses and mini golf
• Local restaurants and shopping options

Whether you’re planning beach days, poolside fun, golfing, or exploring Myrtle Beach’s attractions, this oceanfront condo offers a luxurious and convenient home base for your vacation.

Other things to note

• Minimum age of 25 required to book; guests under 25 must be accompanied by a parent
• Non-smoking property
• No motorcycles, trailers, or pets allowed
• The Island Resort is smoke-free. Absolutely no smoking inside units, on balconies, or common areas
• Luggage carts are not accessible at the resort

Welcome to this 4-bedroom, 3-bath oceanfront condo located at South Wind in beautiful Myrtle Beach. This third-floor retreat offers modern coastal comforts, smart TVs in every room, and breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean, making it perfect for families or friends traveling together.

The fully equipped kitchen features granite countertops, full-size appliances including a stove, microwave, and dishwasher, and includes everything needed to prepare meals during your stay. The open living and dining area provides comfortable seating and access to the wrap-around oceanfront balcony, ideal for morning coffee or evening relaxation while enjoying the sea breeze. For added convenience, the condo includes an in-unit washer and dryer.

The primary bedroom offers a king bed, private bathroom with double vanities, large shower, walk-in closet, and direct access to the balcony. The second bedroom features a queen bed, the third bedroom has two twin beds, and the fourth bedroom includes two queen beds. This layout makes the condo ideal for families, friends, or multi-generational groups traveling together.

The Bed Setup:
• Primary Bedroom: 1 King Bed
• Guest Bedroom 1: 1 Queen Bed
• Guest Bedroom 2: 2 Twin Beds

South Wind is a well-established oceanfront property offering a variety of amenities for guests to enjoy. On-site amenities include indoor and outdoor pools, a lazy river, hot tubs, children’s splash pool, fitness center, and tanning lawn. Area Attractions:
Located in the Downtown Myrtle Beach area, this property places you close to many of the Grand Strand’s most popular attractions. Nearby favorites include:
• Broadway at the Beach
• Barefoot Landing
• Tanger Outlets
• Carolina Opry
• Alabama Theatre
• Myrtle Beach Boardwalk
• Golf courses and mini golf
• Local restaurants and beach bars

Whether you’re planning beach days, shopping trips, golf outings, or evenings enjoying live entertainment, this condo offers a comfortable and convenient home base for your Myrtle Beach getaway.

Other things to note

• No motorcycles, trailers, golf carts, or pets allowed
• Parking limited to 2 vehicles

description:

The space
The master bedroom includes a king size bed, dresser, large closets, ceiling fan, flat screen TV.
• The second bedroom includes a queen size bed, ceiling fan, dresser, large closet and TV.
• The third bedroom includes 2 twin beds, ceiling fan, dresser, large closet and TV.

listing_name: Ocean & Inlet Views, Oceanfront Private Beach Club
description:
Updated, bright and cozy 2 BR/2BA condo with romantic sunset views, sitting right at the dead end of Shore Dr. on the ocean and inlet. At this best family beach location, only steps away from the beach, you can relax and enjoy the quiet serenity as well as all of Sand’s Beach amenities without the busy through traffic. The resort offers 2 pools, hot tub, kiddie pool, gym, tennis courts and more. It is conveniently located close to all popular restaurants, shopping, attractions and night life.

The space
This 700 sq ft quaint Condo is perfect for one couple, individuals, but also comfortably suits a family of 4, even though it can accommodate 5 people. The second bedroom provides a twin daybed with a twin pull out trundle. The Condo offers a fully equipped & updated kitchen, 2 smart tv’s and a balcony with ocean/inlet views. It includes onsite free parking and access to a laundry washroom located on the same floor, just a few steps down the hall. On cold winter nights enjoy the cozy fireplace.

Guest access
Take advantage of all the features that Sands Beach Club with private beach access has to offer including an indoor heated pool, 2 outdoor pools with tables, padded lounging chairs and umbrellas, pool area sun deck, hot tub, kiddie pool, out door showers, pool bathrooms, Weber BBQ grills, onsite restaurant & bar, as well as a pizzeria, ice cream shop, fitness center, lighted tennis, basketball and volleyball courts, covered ocean front patio area with tables, chairs and swings as well as a variety of seasonal activities.

Other things to note
1 minute walk to the beach.
.4 mile walk to the famous Ocean Annie Beach bar and daily live entertainment.
1 mile away from famous Apache Pier: The East Coasts longest wooden Pier, enjoy fishing, arcade, entertainment and food.
1.3 mi Dunes Golf Course: Premiere Country Club and exceptional golfing.
2.8 mi Tanger Outlets: relaxing shopping and savings at your favorite designer and name-brands stores with food court and Starbucks.
3.1 mi Carolina Opry: Award winning Live Music Shows.
4.1 mi Barefoot Landing: Waterfront shopping, dining, and entertainment.
. Close to Super Walmart, Kroger, Publix and Fresh-market.
