listing_name: Stunning 18th Floor Sunrise, KING, Beachfront
description:
Awww, listen to the waves, mesmerizing and therapeutic! We are a BEACHFRONT Resort; your morning sunrise is unobstructed!

We're a one-of-a-kind Sand Dunes unit!
Our MASTER bath is uniquely renovated and has a LARGE true en-suite bathroom with a walk-in shower and TWO shower heads w/ TWO sinks! Look and see! This is a unique remodel. Very few units have the extra spacious en-suite master bath!

We are Chic, yet relaxing; beautifully decorated and fully equipped to be your home-away-from-home!

The space
Please “❤️” our place and add it to your wish list to make it easy to find in future searches! After your research, we believe you will return to our listing!!


Imagine waking up to the sound of gentle waves, sipping coffee on the balcony, and spending your days with your toes in the sand. Our beach condo offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and relaxation — ideal for a romantic getaway, a family trip, or a peaceful solo retreat.


Inside, you’ll find cozy coastal décor, a fully equipped kitchen, and thoughtful touches to make you feel right at home. Stroll to the beach or explore local shops and restaurants, or simply unwind and enjoy stunning sunrises over the ocean.
We love sharing our little slice of paradise and take pride in making each stay special. Come make your beach memories here — your perfect seaside getaway is waiting


We think the best part of our place is the master bedroom orientation; the KING bed is oriented toward the SUNRISE (Most other Sand Dune units' beds are oriented toward the city streets)!! In addition, we have a HUGE EN-SUITE bathroom, again very rare! Check out the photos.


Access the balcony from either the master room or living room, and then just pause... and listen carefully. You'll hear the hypnotic sound of the waves. Just what the doctor ordered...a relaxing, beach getaway.!


You are going to love Home-Suite-Home! The living room is spacious with comfortable sofas for a large group. There is a separate dining area with a large table able to accommodate 8 ppl, AND a quiet reading area in one of the bedrooms (not everyone wants to watch TV or play games ;-))


During our recent renovation we removed the popcorn ceiling, upgraded appliances, enlarged the master suite and en-suite bathroom (the only one at Sand Dunes with an extra LARGE shower with double shower heads!), added beautiful wainscotting and resurfaced the balcony and added comfortable patio furniture.


Sand Dunes Resort has it all, ALL the amenities you could want for your stay! A pizza and ice cream parlour, Pool Grill and Bar, convenience store in the building, arcade, large laundry facility, snackbar, picnic area and BEACHFRONT access!! The bar and grill have daily happy hour and buffet breakfasts on the weekend. You never need to leave! ❤️❤️


Myrtle Beach is renowned as the \Golf Capital of the World\" and boasts over 66 golf courses

Come to relax and enjoy in this lovely ocean view retreat in Myrtle Beach, SC. We are looking forward to hosting you!

For the best views in the area, take a ride up the Myrtle Beach Skywheel - located just over 5 miles away - and then end the day with a sunset stroll down Pier 14!

No matter how you’ve spent your time in Myrtle Beach, we know that our beach and many attractions will make you want to return to make more memories! Bed sure to ask your hosts about early re-booking discounts.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS for this property:
Q: 'Are there any hidden fees?'
A: NO - There are no required 'surprise' costs or resort fees. What you pay when you book is all you will pay for your stay.

Q:Do you provide beach supplies?
A: We do not have facilities for these items. However, we are happy to make suggestions for places to rent these items if you ask us. (In Myrtle Beach, you can actually rent beach chairs and umbrellas right on the beach from the lifeguard stations.)

Q: 'Can I Pay for Access to Additional Amenities?'
A: NO – Sorry, but the building front desk has decided that they do not want to share access to specific amenities that they directly own.  They do not allow guests to purchase entry to those amenities. You will still have access to the amenities listed here at no extra charge and never have to pay a resort fee for that access.

Q: 'Can I Check-In Early?'
A: MAYBE – Our cleaners offer a very limited number of priority check-ins each day that would allow guests to arrive at noon.  The cost is $50 and they must be booked at least 48 hours in advance. They are available on a first come, first served basis. If you would like to add this to your booking, please message us and we will provide additional instructions.

Q: 'Can I Check-Out Late?'
A: NO – Sorry, but due to the cleaning schedule, departure times cannot be changed.

Q: 'Are bath towels and sheets included?'
A: YES – We provide sheets for the beds listed and also 1 bath towel and wash cloth per the occupancy of the property you rented. We do not allow bath towels to be taken to the beach, so please make arrangements for beach/pool towels.

Q: 'Is parking included?'
A: YES - Parking is free for TWO car. You will receive TWO parking passes per unit rented, which is limited by the HOA. We receive limited numbers of parking passes and then we have to purchase them. Please don’t write on it and return it to the unit before you leave to avoid a replacement charge.

Q: 'Can I Pay for an Extra Parking Pass?'
A: NO – Sorry, but parking pass limits are set by the buildings due to the limited parking space available. However, in Myrtle Beach, you can contact the Pavillion Parking Garage that will allow you to park at most meters in the City of Myrtle Beach. The cost of a visitor meter pass is currently $50 per week (Spring 2024).

Q: 'Are there pool arm bands?'
A: MAYBE - Pool arm bands are only required during peak season (June to September). During this time, you will receive one band per person staying in the unit. Please be sure to provide an accurate count when booking or you may not be provided with enough. We receive limited numbers of silicone pool bands and then we have to purchase them. Please return them to the unit before you leave to avoid a replacement charge. If you receive paper pool bands, those can be disposed of when you leave.

Q: 'Do I have to clean/make the beds/do the laundry?'
A: NO - You are on vacation! However, we do ask that you treat the property with care so it stays nice for others & follow a few guidelines before you leave: Please empty the refrigerator, bag up your trash & take out any excess that won’t fit in the cans, and wash your dishes or load/run the dishwasher (if equipped) before you leave. We do not expect you to clean or do laundry before you check out, but we do ask that you tidy up after yourself with those few items that are not included in the cleaning fee.

Q: 'Do you allow pets?'
A: NO, sorry - Pets are not allowed at this resort per our HOA bylaws. However, we do currently rent 5 properties where we can accept small dogs. Contact us for more details.

Q: 'Can I smoke in the unit or on the balcony?'
A: NO, sorry – SMOKING OF ANY KIND IS STRICTLY FORBIDDEN in this unit and on the balcony - no exceptions. It is very costly to have a service remove smoking odors - especially in the short time between guests. If we need to have the unit treated because of the smell of smoke or if we find that you have tampered with the smoke detectors to hide that smoking has occurred, it will result in a minimum $250 charge. Please be sure to read the entire rental agreement and house rules for more information about smoking.

Q: 'Are there pots/pans/dishes?'
A: YES - The kitchen is equipped with the basic items needed for cooking/eating. If there is some specialty small appliance you enjoy, please feel free to bring it along.

Guest access

Guest access

description:
ESCAPE TO THE BEACH! Our premium, sought after, end unit provides you with endless views day or night with added windows and sunlight! The elements of the Earth are right at your fingertips on the oceanfront balcony; Water, earth, air/wind, and fireworks! listing_name: Across from Beach | 5BR | Sands Beach House 313
description:
Top Reasons to Book this Coastal Beach House:

The space
• Directly across the street from the beach — enjoy easy beach access and morning sunrises
• Spacious 5-bedroom, 5.5-bath layout — ideal for families looking for comfort and privacy
• Professionally decorated interior with hardwood floors, granite & quartz countertops, and tray ceilings
• Elevator access, three covered patios, and two-car garage for convenience
• Quiet, residential location near restaurants, bars, and Starbucks
• Professionally Managed

Welcome to this 5-bedroom, 5.5-bath coastal beach house at New Sands Beach House, located just across the street from the ocean in a peaceful, family-friendly community. This beautifully appointed home offers comfort, elegance, and ample space for multiple families. The fully equipped kitchen features granite and quartz countertops, while the open living areas flow seamlessly onto covered patios — including a top-floor patio perfect for sunrise coffee.

Each bedroom includes a private bath, making it ideal for families or groups traveling together. The elevator provides easy access to all three levels.

The Bed Setup
• 3rd Level Bedrooms: 2 King Beds, 1 Queen Bed
• 2nd Level Bedroom: 1 Queen Bed
• 1st Level Bedroom: 1 Queen Bed, 1 Queen Sleeper Sofa

New Sands Beach House is set in a quiet residential neighborhood, offering a relaxed and private coastal experience while still being close to dining, shopping, and local attractions.

Area Attractions
• Myrtle Beach Boardwalk
• Nearby restaurants, bars, and cafés including Starbucks
• Close to golf courses, family-friendly activities, and shopping
• Quick access to the beach for sunbathing, swimming, and coastal walks

This home provides a luxurious, family-friendly retreat perfect for your Myrtle Beach vacation.

Other things to note
Important Information
• Minimum age of 25 required to book; guests under 25 must be accompanied by a parent
• Non-smoking property
• Maximum parking available: 3 vehicles; additional parking on 74th Ave N (first come, first served)
• No motorcycles, trailers, or pets allowed
